summary_text: Status summary for the two IDs: - `3376b8c0-f0ac-8126-99e4-f4326a076d01` (`AIに、臨床の魂を`) - Live `x-auto/post_queue.json` entry uses `image_path: /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac812699e4f4326a076d01.png` and `notion_page_id` is set. - That local x-auto image exists and its SHA-256 matches the repo “bold” candidate image: - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/output/x-auto/20260404_clinical-soul-bold.png` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac812699e4f4326a076d01.png` - Repo draft/candidate entry (`20260402_x-auto_queue_candidates.json`) still points to `output/x-auto/20260404_clinical-soul-abstract.png` and has `notion_page_id: null` (mismatch). - `3376b8c0-f0ac-8171-9ea1-e8bb62443cab` (`goサインの説明ができない導入は、まだ早い`) - Live `x-auto/post_queue.json` entry uses `image_path: /Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac81719ea1e8bb62443cab.png` and `notion_page_id` is set. - That local x-auto image exists and matches repo “bold” candidate: - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/output/x-auto/20260404_go-sign-bold.png` - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/images/3376b8c0f0ac81719ea1e8bb62443cab.png` - Repo draft/candidate entry points to `output/x-auto/20260404_go-sign-abstract.png` and `notion_page_id: null` (mismatch). Discrepancies found: - Candidate artifacts are still on `*-abstract.png` for both posts and have no Notion linkage (`notion_page_id: null`), while live queue uses per-page hashed x-auto images for both. - The “bold” thumbnails are present in live x-auto assets and aligned to queue `image_path`, but I could not verify Notion `Image` property values from this session (Notion API DNS/network not reachable here). - No `Notion Image updated for <notion_page_id>` entries were found in recent scheduler logs for these two IDs.
